videos.title: A local's guide to Brighton - Hidden gems and insider tips
videos.description:
Join me for a fun and informative tour of Brighton, one of the UK’s most vibrant and eclectic seaside cities! In this video, I’ll show you the best things to do in Brighton, from must-see attractions to hidden gems.

🌊 What’s included:

Highlights of Brighton Pier and the Royal Pavilion

Exploring The Lanes and North Laine for indie shops and street art

Tips on where to eat in Brighton — from local favorites to seaside snacks

Fun activities and experiences you won’t want to miss

A look at different areas of the city, perfect for first-time visitors

Whether you're planning a day trip to Brighton, a weekend getaway, or just curious about what makes this city so unique, this guide has you covered.

👉 Like, comment, and subscribe for more UK travel content and city guides!

Thanks to @Sussexy for the train drone shot 

Music
Downtown Walk by | e s c p | https://www.escp.space
https://escp-music.bandcamp.com

Hot Pepper by Alex-Productions | https://onsound.eu/
Music promoted by https://www.free-stock-music.com

https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/3.0/deed.en_US

videos.transcript: welcome to Brighton my [Music] hometown often referred to as London by the Sea Brighton is just 47 m south of the capital and only an hour away by train making an ideal day trip
